text: Nuno Felix RT @Osint613 : New Hungarian PM Peter Magyar on relations with Israel: "I cannot guarantee that Hungary will continue to block EU decisions regarding Israel. As in any other case, each issue and each decision will be examined on its merits. However, I do not want to predetermine a position on the subject. We will see what decisions the union will make, and we will examine what serves the interests and justice." tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转发 @Osint613 ：匈牙利新任总理彼得·马扎尔（Peter Magyar）谈及与以色列的关系：“我无法保证匈牙利会继续阻止欧盟有关以色列的决定。正如其他任何情况一样，每一个问题和每一项决定都将根据其自身情况进行审查。然而，我不想预先确定在这个问题上的立场。我们将看看欧盟会做出什么决定，并审查什么符合利益和正义。” 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @NadavPollak : Another step in Bibi’s mission to ruin every good place that we still have in Israel NEW MOSSAD CHIEF is Roman Gofman, currently Israeli PM Netanyahu's military secretary. It's an unusual move for an outsider appointment, but Meir Dagan pulled it off in 2002. - Yonah Jeremy Bob tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转发 @NadavPollak ：比比（Bibi）摧毁我们在以色列仍然拥有的每一个好地方的使命又迈出了一步。新任摩萨德局长是罗曼·戈夫曼（Roman Gofman），目前是以色列总理内塔尼亚胡的军事秘书。对于外部任命来说，这是一个不同寻常的举动，但梅尔·达甘（Meir Dagan）在2002年成功做到了这一点。 - Yonah Jeremy Bob 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Nuno Felix RT @michaeldweiss : Orban's foreign minister offered Iran's assistance after Israel blew the balls off Hezbollah operatives. “Our secret service has already contacted your services and we will share all the information we have gathered during the investigation,” Peter Szijjarto told Abbas Araghchi, per @AineBelton 's reporting: https://www.washingtonpost.com/world/2026/04/08/hungary-iran-hezbollah-trump-orban/ I want to express my deep appreciation to my dear friend @PM_ViktorOrban , a true friend of Israel, who stood firmly by Israel's side in the face of unjust international vilification and who supported Israel's soldiers in our just war of self-defense against brutal terrorists. The people of Israel will forever remember this. I congratulate Peter Magyar on his election victory. I wish him success in leading Hungary forward, while strengthening the strong ties between our nations. I look forward to continuing our cooperation for the benefit of both our peoples. - Benjamin Netanyahu - בנימין נתניהו tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Nuno Felix 转发 @michaeldweiss ：欧尔班的外交部长在以色列重创真主党武装人员后，向伊朗提供了援助。“我们的特勤局已经联系了你们的部门，我们将分享我们在调查期间收集到的所有信息，”彼得·西亚尔托（Peter Szijjarto）告诉阿巴斯·阿拉格希（Abbas Araghchi），据 @AineBelton 的报道：https://www.washingtonpost.com/world/2026/04/08/hungary-iran-hezbollah-trump-orban/ 我想向我亲爱的朋友 @PM_ViktorOrban 表示深切的感谢，他是以色列真正的朋友，在面对不公正的国际诋毁时坚定地站在以色列一边，并支持以色列士兵进行正义的自卫战争，对抗残酷的恐怖分子。以色列人民将永远铭记这一点。我祝贺彼得·马扎尔赢得选举胜利。我祝愿他在领导匈牙利前进的同时，加强我们两国之间的牢固联系。我期待着继续我们的合作，造福我们两国人民。 - 本雅明·内塔尼亚胡 - בנימין נתניהו 推文

text: Open Source Intel JUST IN 🔴 DoorDash's market cap has risen by roughly $1.87 billion since Trump received his McDonald's delivery at the Oval Office today. WILD FOOTAGE 🔴 President Trump had McDonald’s delivered to the Oval Office via DoorDash, right before his presser. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043735877692572068/video/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 最新消息 🔴 自特朗普今天在椭圆形办公室收到麦当劳外卖以来，DoorDash 的市值上涨了约 18.7 亿美元。疯狂的画面 🔴 特朗普总统在新闻发布会前，通过 DoorDash 将麦当劳送到了椭圆形办公室。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043735877692572068/video/1 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @PolitlcsUS : 🚨 PICTURED: David Lammy meets with JD Vance https://twitter.com/PolitlcsUS/status/2043781131993039207/photo/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel Zelensky: "For the first time in the history of this war, an enemy position was taken exclusively by unmanned platforms – ground systems and drones. The occupiers surrendered, and the operation was carried out without infantry and without losses on our side." Ukraine's ground robotic systems have carried out over 22,000 missions in just three months. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 泽连斯基：“在这场战争史上，敌方阵地首次完全由无人平台——地面系统和无人机——夺取。占领者投降了，行动是在没有步兵参与且我方没有损失的情况下进行的。” 乌克兰的地面机器人系统在短短三个月内执行了超过 22,000 次任务。 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Status-6 (War & Military News) RT @cossackgundi : Four years ago today, the Russians made what was probably one of the most absurd mistakes in a propaganda campaign that they somehow continued to make even worse. Before we went to the surrender point, I recorded a video of myself, clearly visible and in good health. Just 32 hours later, they put me in front of the cameras looking very different, while insisting I had been treated well and was speaking freely. In the middle of everything else, I remember feeling a small sense of satisfaction. They were so determined to push the lie that they ended up exposing the truth themselves. In trying to convince the world that I had been treated well, they instead showed exactly what they do to prisoners, and how little they cared whether anyone could see it. The sad thing is I was only one example. There are countless others who went through the same treatment, and far worse. Torture, beatings, murder, and every kind of abuse have become a pattern, not an exception. Many never came home to tell their story. For all the darkness of that time, there was at least one small victory in watching their own propaganda expose them. Sometimes that is all you can take from it. tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 OSINT Status-6 (战争与军事新闻) 转发 @cossackgundi ：四年前的今天，俄罗斯人在一场宣传运动中犯下了可能是最荒谬的错误之一，而且他们不知何故让情况变得更糟。在我们前往投降点之前，我录制了一段自己的视频，清晰可见且身体健康。仅仅 32 小时后，他们就把我放在摄像机前，看起来大不相同，同时坚称我受到了很好的对待，并且可以自由发言。在所有其他事情中，我记得感到一种小小的满足感。他们如此执着于推行谎言，以至于最终自己揭露了真相。在试图让世界相信我受到了很好的对待时，他们反而准确地展示了他们对囚犯做了什么，以及他们根本不在乎是否有人能看到。可悲的是，我只是一个例子。还有无数其他人经历了同样的待遇，甚至更糟。酷刑、殴打、谋杀和各种虐待已成为一种模式，而不是例外。许多人从未回家讲述他们的故事。尽管那个时期一片黑暗，但至少在看到他们自己的宣传揭露他们时，有一种小小的胜利。有时这就是你能从中得到的全部。 推文

text: Open Source Intel NEW 🔴 U.S. Secretary of State Rubio may attend tomorrow's meeting between the Lebanese and Israeli ambassadors in Washington. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043794969547129007/photo/1 JUST IN 🔴 Israeli Ambassador Yehiel Leiter will meet with Lebanon's ambassador in Washington tomorrow. The meeting will be held at the State Department. Michel Issa, the U.S. ambassador to Lebanon, and Michael Needham, Rubio's senior adviser, will attend on the American side. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 最新消息 🔴 美国国务卿卢比奥（Rubio）可能会出席明天在华盛顿举行的黎巴嫩和以色列大使之间的会议。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2043794969547129007/photo/1 最新消息 🔴 以色列大使耶希尔·莱特（Yehiel Leiter）明天将在华盛顿会见黎巴嫩大使。会议将在国务院举行。美国驻黎巴嫩大使米歇尔·伊萨（Michel Issa）和卢比奥的高级顾问迈克尔·尼达姆（Michael Needham）将代表美方出席。 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: NEW: The U.S. Navy is moving multiple minesweeping ships from the Pacific toward the Middle East, signaling preparations for a large-scale operation to clear Iranian naval mines from the Strait of Hormuz. SOURCE
text_zh: 最新消息：美国海军正在将多艘扫雷舰从太平洋移向中东，这标志着为大规模清除霍尔木兹海峡伊朗海军水雷的行动做准备。来源

text: Trump: For those people that still read The Failing New York Times and, despite the fact that Iran has been totally OBLITERATED, Militarily, and otherwise, you would think that Iran is actually winning or, at the very least, doing quite well — But that’s not true, and The New York Times knows that it’s FAKE NEWS! When does this Corrupt Media Outlet apologize for their LIES and horrible actions against me, my supporters, and our Country itself! HAVE THEY NO SHAME? HAVE THEY NO SENSE OF DECENCY?
text_zh: 特朗普：对于那些仍然阅读《失败的纽约时报》的人来说，尽管伊朗在军事和其他方面已经完全被摧毁，你可能会认为伊朗实际上正在获胜，或者至少做得相当不错——但事实并非如此，《纽约时报》知道这是假新闻！这家腐败的媒体机构何时为他们针对我、我的支持者以及我们国家本身的谎言和可怕行为道歉！他们难道没有羞耻心吗？他们难道没有一点体面感吗？

text: 🇺🇸 Trump lashes out at The New York Times over its reporting on the war with Iran. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普因《纽约时报》关于与伊朗战争的报道而对其进行抨击。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 — Trump attacks the media for saying he’s losing in Iran, calling it “fake news” and asking, “have they no shame? have they no sense of decency?”
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 — 特朗普抨击媒体称他在伊朗战败，称其为“假新闻”，并问道：“他们难道没有羞耻心吗？他们难道没有一点体面感吗？”

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇸 The USS George H.W. Bush (CVN-77) has crossed the Strait of Gibraltar. It is now the third U.S. aircraft carrier entering the Iran theater. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇺🇸 According to USNI News—the media arm of the U.S. Naval Institute—the USS George H.W. Bush (CVN-77) is operating off Namibia, taking an unusual route around Africa to join a growing U.S. naval buildup in the Arabian Sea amid a U.S. blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. Instead of transiting the Strait of Gibraltar and Mediterranean, the strike group—escorted by USS Donald Cook (DDG-75), USS Mason (DDG-87), USS Ross (DDG-71), and supported by USNS Arctic (TAOE-8)—is bypassing the Red Sea and Bab el-Mandeb. ℹ️ Earlier today, some reports said it had crossed Gibraltar; however, this now appears not to be the case. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇸 乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰（CVN-77）已穿过直布罗陀海峡。它现在是第三艘进入伊朗战区的美国航空母舰。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇺🇸 据美国海军研究所（USNI）的媒体机构 USNI News 称，乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰（CVN-77）正在纳米比亚附近海域行动，采取了一条绕过非洲的不寻常路线，以加入在霍尔木兹海峡美国封锁期间日益增长的美国海军集结。该打击群由唐纳德·库克号驱逐舰（DDG-75）、梅森号驱逐舰（DDG-87）、罗斯号驱逐舰（DDG-71）护航，并由北极号补给舰（TAOE-8）支援，没有通过直布罗陀海峡和地中海，而是绕过了红海和曼德海峡。 ℹ️ 今天早些时候，一些报道称它已经穿过了直布罗陀；然而，现在看来并非如此。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇩🇪 🇵🇸 🇮🇱 German Chancellor Merz expressed concern to Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu about recent events in the West Bank, urging that there must be no annexation of the West Bank. @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness ⚡ 🇮🇷 The number of ships transits between Kharg island and mainland Iran has remained high despite the ongoing ceasefire. Satellite imagery from April 6th and 11th showed 7 and 28 ships respectively. This is down from the peak of the war (33) but still significantly above usual numbers. The IRGC is expected to continue the renforcement of the island as the threat of the return of the war looms over the region. This is not the daily number of transits but the number of ships seen at once on the satellite imagery . @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness ⚡ 🇮🇷 尽管停火仍在继续，但哈尔克岛（Kharg island）与伊朗大陆之间的船只往来数量依然很高。4月6日和11日的卫星图像分别显示有 7 艘和 28 艘船只。这低于战争高峰期（33 艘），但仍显著高于通常数量。随着战争回归的威胁笼罩该地区，预计伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）将继续加强该岛的防御。这不是每日的过境数量，而是卫星图像上同时看到的船只数量。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 Heavy Israeli airstrikes have targeted the city of Tyre a few moments ago. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israeli Flare bombs in the sky of Tyre, Southern Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇮🇱 以色列刚才对提尔市（Tyre）进行了猛烈的空袭。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列照明弹在黎巴嫩南部提尔市上空。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷The USS George H.W. Bush has crossed the Strait of Gibraltar enroute to the Middle East. This picture is old. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 USNI News: The USS George H.W. Bush didn’t sail through the Strait of Gibraltar to the Mediterranean, but rather the aircraft carrier will sail around Africa to avoid sailing through the Red Sea and the Bab el-Mandeb. Both of these areas would put aircraft carrier at risk of attack from Houthi drones or missiles. A notice to mariners states that a “grace period” allowing neutral vessels to leave Iranian ports has ended, warning that any ship entering or departing the blockaded area without authorisation may face interception, diversion, or capture. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰已穿过直布罗陀海峡前往中东。这张照片是旧的。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 USNI News：乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰并没有穿过直布罗陀海峡进入地中海，而是将绕非洲航行，以避免通过红海和曼德海峡。这两个区域都会使航空母舰面临胡塞武装无人机或导弹袭击的风险。一份海员通知称，允许中立船只离开伊朗港口的“宽限期”已经结束，警告任何未经授权进入或离开封锁区域的船只可能会面临拦截、改道或扣押。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Heavy Israeli airstrikes have targeted the city of Tyre a few moments ago. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列刚才对提尔市进行了猛烈的空袭。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel Illinois has repealed its HIV-specific criminal statute after Governor JB Pritzker signed new legislation, ending felony penalties tied to non-disclosure under a law dating back to 1986. The move removes provisions that criminalized activities such as sex, needle sharing, or blood donation without disclosure. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 伊利诺伊州在州长 JB·普利兹克（JB Pritzker）签署新立法后，废除了其针对艾滋病毒（HIV）的特定刑事法规，结束了与 1986 年法律规定的未披露信息相关的重罪处罚。此举删除了将性行为、共用针头或献血等未披露行为定为犯罪的条款。 推文

text: 🇮🇷 Dr. Mohammad Javad Larijani: "The Islamic Republic of Iran today is the world's greatest missile power. Our air force power is not that great. We're not pursuing atomic power either. But we are the world's greatest missile power, and we know how to use it." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 穆罕默德·贾瓦德·拉里贾尼博士（Dr. Mohammad Javad Larijani）：“今天的伊朗伊斯兰共和国是世界上最伟大的导弹强国。我们的空军力量并不那么强大。我们也没有追求原子能。但我们是世界上最伟大的导弹强国，而且我们知道如何使用它。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 🇸🇦 🇶🇦 🇴🇲 🇪🇬 Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi held a phone call with Russian Foreign Minister Sergey Lavrov to discuss the latest regional developments and the Iran–US negotiations in Islamabad, Pakistan. He also held separate calls with Saudi Foreign Minister Faisal bin Farhan, Qatari Prime Minister and Foreign Minister Mohammed bin Abdulrahman Al Thani, Omani Foreign Minister Badr Al-Busaidi, and Egyptian Foreign Minister Badr Abdel Aati. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇷🇺 🇸🇦 🇶🇦 🇴🇲 🇪🇬 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格希与俄罗斯外交部长谢尔盖·拉夫罗夫通电话，讨论最新的地区局势发展以及在巴基斯坦伊斯兰堡举行的伊美谈判。他还分别与沙特外交部长费萨尔·本·法汉（Faisal bin Farhan）、卡塔尔首相兼外交大臣穆罕默德·本·阿卜杜勒拉赫曼·阿勒萨尼（Mohammed bin Abdulrahman Al Thani）、阿曼外交大臣巴德尔·本·哈马德·布赛义迪（Badr Al-Busaidi）和埃及外交部长巴德尔·阿卜杜勒·阿提（Badr Abdel Aati）进行了通话。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇸🇾 🌟 Syrian Government Forces launched multiple morter shells toward the city of Swaida, in retaliation Swaida's National Guard shelled Syrian Government Forces positions. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇸🇾 🌟 叙利亚政府军向苏韦达市（Swaida）发射了多枚迫击炮弹，作为报复，苏韦达国民警卫队炮击了叙利亚政府军阵地。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇮🇱 Multiple Israeli reconnaissance drones over Quenitra and Daraa Governorate according to local sources. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇮🇱 据当地消息来源，多架以色列侦察无人机飞越库奈特拉（Quenitra）和德拉省（Daraa Governorate）。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇺🇸 The American carrier strike group centered around USS Gerald R. Ford was operating today east of Cyprus. She was already in the same area two days ago, she is not in transit and is expected to remain in the area until new orders are given. The carrier can be seen being refuelled by a supply ship. They are flanked by a pair of Arleigh Burke class destroyers. The European Space Agency providing the satellite imagery is delaying by a day the release of satellite imagery of the eastern Mediterranean sea where the European carrier group is operating. The American carrier strike group was caught here right on the edge. This is why the right part of the satellite view isn't loaded. CVN-78 33.75N 29.18E @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇺🇸 以杰拉尔德·R·福特号（USS Gerald R. Ford）为核心的美国航母打击群今天在塞浦路斯以东海域行动。两天前她就已经在同一地区，她没有在过境，预计在接到新命令之前将留在该地区。可以看到航母正在由一艘补给舰加油。他们由一对阿利·伯克级驱逐舰护航。提供卫星图像的欧洲航天局正在推迟发布欧洲航母群所在的地中海东部卫星图像。美国航母打击群在这里被拍到正好在边缘。这就是为什么卫星视图的右侧没有加载的原因。CVN-78 33.75N 29.18E @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: The US blockade of Iranian trade through the Strait of Hormuz is pushing global oil markets into renewed turmoil, with supply already under severe strain. Around “2 million barrels per day” of Iranian oil exports could be removed from the market, intensifying a global scramble for crude. Oil prices have surged, with Brent crude rising to about $101 a barrel. Shipbrokers say that it isn't clear how ships can satisfy both US and Iranian conditions on leaving the Persian Gulf, and tanker owners say they will hesitate before sending new vessels through the Strait @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ：美国对伊朗通过霍尔木兹海峡贸易的封锁正将全球石油市场推向新的动荡，供应已经处于严重紧张状态。伊朗每天约“200万桶”的石油出口可能会从市场上消失，加剧全球对原油的争夺。油价飙升，布伦特原油价格升至每桶约 101 美元。船舶经纪人表示，目前尚不清楚船只如何能同时满足美国和伊朗关于离开波斯湾的条件，油轮船东表示，在派遣新船只通过海峡之前会犹豫不决 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 💬 🇮🇷 CNN: Trump officials are internally discussing details for a potential second, in-person meeting with Iranian officials before the ceasefire between Washington and Tehran expires next week, should the opportunity present itself, a source familiar with the talks told CNN, though it’s unclear whether such a meeting could materialize. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 💬 🇮🇷 CNN：一位熟悉谈判的消息人士告诉 CNN，特朗普政府官员正在内部讨论在下周华盛顿与德黑兰之间的停火协议到期前，如果机会出现，可能与伊朗官员进行第二次面对面会谈的细节，尽管目前尚不清楚这样的会谈能否实现。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness" ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起红色警报警报。 @wfwitness” ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区无人机警报警报已激活。 @wfwitness

text: 🇰🇲 Elpis, a Comoros-flagged oil and chemical "shadow fleet" tanker sanctioned by the U.S. in 2025 for handling Iranian petroleum, appears to be challenging Trump’s blockade. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇰🇲 Elpis 号，一艘悬挂科摩罗旗帜的石油和化学品“影子船队”油轮，因处理伊朗石油而在 2025 年受到美国制裁，似乎正在挑战特朗普的封锁。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起红色警报警报。 @wfwitness

text: Instead of taking the usual route through the Mediterranean and Red Sea, the USS George H.W. Bush is sailing the much longer route around Africa to reach the Persian Gulf. The detour avoids Houthi-controlled waters like the Red Sea and Bab el-Mandeb. Source: USNI
text_zh: 乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰没有采取通常的地中海和红海路线，而是绕非洲航行了更长的路线到达波斯湾。这次绕道避开了红海和曼德海峡等胡塞武装控制的水域。来源：USNI

text: Instead of taking the usual route through the Mediterranean and Red Sea, the USS George H.W. Bush is sailing the much longer route around Africa to reach the Persian Gulf. The detour avoids Houthi-controlled waters like the Red Sea and Bab el-Mandeb. Source: USNI
text_zh: 乔治·H·W·布什号航空母舰没有采取通常的地中海和红海路线，而是绕非洲航行了更长的路线到达波斯湾。这次绕道避开了红海和曼德海峡等胡塞武装控制的水域。来源：USNI

text: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah Secretary-General Sheikh Naim Qassem on attempts to create sectarian strife: "They are starting to promote that Turkey is creating a problem between Sunnis and Shia. Who is working on this? The Americans and the Israelis and Israel's servants internally. They want the strife to be between others, so they can get rid of both. We with our brothers the Sunnis are one heart. This strife, they will not succeed in it. Israel's servants will fail. We will not allow strife to raise its head. The Christians of all their sects and the Muslims of all their denominations — Sunnis and Druze and Alawites and all — are our brothers in the nation, in religion, and in the heavenly messages. What unites us is much stronger than the devils of the interior and exterior and the trumpets of strife." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇱🇧 真主党秘书长谢赫·纳伊姆·卡西姆（Sheikh Naim Qassem）谈及制造宗派冲突的企图：“他们开始宣传土耳其正在制造逊尼派和什叶派之间的问题。谁在做这件事？美国人、以色列人和以色列在内部的仆从。他们希望冲突发生在别人之间，这样他们就可以摆脱双方。我们与我们的逊尼派兄弟是一条心。这种冲突，他们不会成功。以色列的仆从将会失败。我们不会允许冲突抬头。所有教派的基督徒和所有教派的穆斯林——逊尼派、德鲁兹派、阿拉维派等等——都是我们在国家、宗教和天启信息中的兄弟。团结我们的东西比内部和外部的魔鬼以及冲突的号角要强大得多。” 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 🇻🇦 ⚡️ Trump deleted his AI-generated image on TRUTH Social, depicting himself as Jesus Christ.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇻🇦 ⚡️ 特朗普删除了他在 TRUTH Social 上发布的 AI 生成的将自己描绘成耶稣基督的图片。

text: BIG: A U.S. Army unit ran out of its ENTIRE stock of Precision Strike Missiles (PRSM) early in last month’s war with Iran. The missile — still in testing at the time — was used in combat for the first time and expended quickly. SOURCE
text_zh: 重大：美国陆军的一个部队在上个月与伊朗的战争初期耗尽了其“所有”精确打击导弹（PRSM）库存。这种导弹——当时仍处于测试阶段——首次用于实战并迅速耗尽。来源

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇻🇦🇺🇸 "I have no fear of the Trump administration or speaking out loudly of the message of the Gospel, which is what I believe I am here to do, what the Church is here to do." - Pope Leo XIV 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇮🇷 🇻🇦 Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf publicly honors Pope Leo XIV for condemning US and Israeli war crimes, calling his stance "fearless." 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇻🇦🇺🇸 ‘我不害怕特朗普政府，也不害怕大声说出福音的信息，我相信这就是我在这里要做的事情，也是教会在这里要做的事情。’ - 教皇利奥十四世 🔴 @DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐赠 | 广告” 🇮🇷 🇻🇦 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫（Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf）公开向谴责美国和以色列战争罪行的教皇利奥十四世致敬，称他的立场是“无畏的”。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Trump: I think you voted for me. DoorDash worker: Uhh, maybe.
text_zh: 特朗普：我想你投了我的票。DoorDash 员工：呃，也许吧。

text: Hezbollah leader Naim Qassem urged Lebanon to cancel planned talks with Israel in Washington, calling them pointless, while vowing to continue confronting Israeli attacks.
text_zh: 真主党领导人纳伊姆·卡西姆敦促黎巴嫩取消计划中在华盛顿与以色列的会谈，称其毫无意义，并誓言继续对抗以色列的袭击。

text: The U.S. and Iran are still in contact after failed weekend talks, with officials saying there is “forward motion” toward a possible agreement. Source: CBS News
text_zh: 美国和伊朗在周末会谈失败后仍保持联系，官员们表示，在达成可能协议方面存在“向前推进”的迹象。来源：CBS News

text: Venezuela is set to grant new oil fields to Chevron to boost production, as part of efforts to attract foreign investment and revive its energy sector. Source: Bloomberg
text_zh: 委内瑞拉准备将新的油田授予雪佛龙（Chevron）以提高产量，作为吸引外国投资和振兴其能源部门努力的一部分。来源：彭博社

text: Netanyahu attacks Europe: Europe is losing control of its identity, infected with deep moral weakness.
text_zh: 内塔尼亚胡抨击欧洲：欧洲正在失去对其身份的控制，被深深的道德软弱所感染。
